textByHash.04c30c7e3a964830bdac76d283246109e6e75745: : Other than maintainin' safe passage and savin' lives?!
textByHash.0a0da19d3565bdb66557b65f5f610e377af76053: Aye, that be the easy part!
textByHash.0fe894a127a0396f8e4985412391c2a829cc70dc: If ye get hit by the waves or fire, don't be surprised when ye lose those fish an' tools ye gathered. Now get t' the fight, sailor!
textByHash.1415ea3c999aa472bd141bdc367c3687e4c3fd58: Tempoross has disabled a cannon! Switch to another!
textByHash.1717ad5e7b3808bde559dbad98d2da76ff09e783: As soon as they could talk sense they went to the Chancellor and within days more shockin' tales of the Sea Spirit's wrath came in.
textByHash.1b049c1d34c24c4f12201df0c7a18d8fe1d33c29: Storm clouds are rolling in, get your buckets ready!
textByHash.1c69b69fe5ac34a305ec57dc6f4d0512891fc163: The storm has grown too strong, we must retreat!
textByHash.1ca80ad89e4ca3c652e6449f00be14e10a90eb58: Argh, we let that storm grow too fierce... As soon as it's safe we'll 'ead straight back out!
textByHash.1ca8ca8a839f2c6e5dd0df18e4118e33ac9adfe6: Taiman and his crew were one of the first t' run into it. Washed up outside Al Kharid amongst piles of debris, they did. 'Tis a troublin' time to be a cap'n!
textByHash.22ac265cadaeaded38dffcd31476ec6246167a82: Excellent work out there! The seas are safe for a little longer thanks to you!
textByHash.2677c325104503f5909ed4684c493bce763bf2a7: If Tempoross electrocutes a cannon t' stop it from firin', ya better load your harpoonfish into the other ammunition crates t' keep them cannons firin' instead.
textByHash.2bb51232a04593ba5cfdad8815ccd8d471f36e9e: Tempoross is drawing in water, prepare yourselves!
textByHash.2c1da09c12298137c54afb6b332629a1f0f735cc: Belay that! We'll try again later.
textByHash.3bec1941aa504f1c15adbc8f80aec1d2d68af42e: Tempoross is some kind o' great sea spirit that's been spookin' sailors and causing crazy storms!
textByHash.3ee95ebea44eab32ea4d34b59ba2b54f94f5331b: We'll set sail in the next 20 seconds.
textByHash.409f473fa8ee5abad480dd9ee7b3596713ee40d2: Tempoross has gathered too much energy!
textByHash.422fa49313b3c8bd7086f3af0117af5f46cdbe3f: I like t' get stuck in, me-self; face off toe t' toe with the beastie. I'll be right by your side when you go out there!
textByHash.45665a49e9ee43862bb285fe55afb10fa0d34cba: If it's not needed for the Spirit Anglers' research, it's yours to keep!
textByHash.4dad24c2f359255e55cb31506d2d8ddb00dcb244: Anyway, it was decided that we'd setup a base 'ere amongst these ruins, and so the Spirit Anglers was formed!
textByHash.5748558c280c803f2156ade5ffdfbcd501b56eac: Take a well deserved rest but don't get too comfy, it'll regain its energy soon enough!
textByHash.580ae5698216aecee619306b6b0db0340a20cd9d: Get yerself a harpoon from the crate on the ship, then go fish around the island t' catch some harpoonfish. They make fer fine ammo against Tempoross!
textByHash.5c3237cc49217fe7d70f8710199c898f05a058ba: The storm of Tempoross will rage around you, so you better be ready to deal with lightning strikes and avoid getting zapped when Tempoross attacks the cannons.
textByHash.5c8ff235628ed1f107613a087aba996065a30db7: Our cannoneers will get t' firin' the harpoonfish at Tempoross. When it's weak an' submerges to recover its energy, get down to the jetty next t' the ship an' fish those spirit pools.
textByHash.63121fc5ee3f19d49e04b0e2d7ad2769a2185ca5: Be quick with fishin' those spirit pools though, or it'll come back so strong we'll have to abandon the fight! With any luck, we'll weaken those spirit fish enough t' subdue Tempoross. Now get t' the fight, sailor!
textByHash.63b41eeb53953c2f7a54f82cf95d6792f7da5e45: The ships on the dock regularly embark to Tempoross Cove. Once there, you'll need to keep the cannons loaded with Harpoonfish t' weaken the Spirit. You can fish 'em on the island.
textByHash.66cc1d4b4f3be0cd649a827d18cc48dd8deb8948: We'll set sail in the next 5 seconds.
textByHash.6ea0e6294930a8564cfbb11c9edb8de2d5c542f4: Some of the more resourceful Spirit Anglers also discovered a fishing use for the spirit energised scales shed by the fish within Tempoross. You're free t' keep any you find.
textByHash.6fe9dfe4cf9a1b47d8704e487cffbf0147097465: We'll set sail in the next 10 seconds.
textByHash.705faf0ebccd8656b9a053849d29777444273469: Also, watch out for those mighty waves! You'll want t' tether yourself t' something solid so you don't find yourself lost in the deep blue when they come crashing down!
textByHash.71635f235be9709d24d06d77d5ef88b9ab956d1f: The complete Spirit Anglers outfit also has an 'andy harness built-in, so you won't need a rope if you're wearin' it. You can speak t' Gita about getting one.
textByHash.7243f8473d33349801c52c28f5bf1310610d6e55: Tempoross has submerged, fish from the whirlpools!
textByHash.73d8a7e1053b51046a3017c9e4b96447d78f9ee6: Oh, an' keep an eye out for lightnin' clouds causin' fires. Get a bucket from the ship crates, fill it with water at a pump, and get t' puttin it out before it spreads.
textByHash.73e4b77ef019dcac69f3aeaa3fae2cd5b1c284ab: Ahoy! I'm Cap'n Pudi, currently assisting the Spirit Anglers in their effort against Tempoross.
textByHash.77e5a982279ec2f387fc97c3ea64aadc2d567c45: We usually find some debris washed up near the docks. Feel free to have a look. Ya might find somethin' useful!
textByHash.787ae2b51bb430f7cc1cb780d486d91486d6777e: To the boats! We'll set sail soon!
textByHash.7d62d2142609a704b6c695ee6fe3d60276f7adde: We did it! Tempoross has been sudbued once again. Well done!
textByHash.813c466d636ecabb72c2c26ccadd4f8c78088327: Everythin' you need can be found on-board. Though if you have a favourite harpoon, you can always bring that!
textByHash.81be2360b60b171dc51cca3f30a506515a0156a9: Sorry, it's pretty rough out there and you look like you could do with more experience.
textByHash.823a093df16fcc0193f528efde0b9a125f607061: What do you need, adventurer? There is a battle to fight!
textByHash.86c17bf0b8d430e3e5c04efe6d7a01b7d8825e2b: When Tempoross submerges, get up close and clear the fish from its whirlpools; they're how it gets its energy.
textByHash.8887ea7a5bfd11afb3c2fbd3181a59e6d9870d3d: If the waves break the totem pole or ship mast, ye can grab a hammer from the ship crates t' fix 'em up before the next big wave hits.
textByHash.8a63ec8f4510abb9d970c3551e6508703683ff9b: Come and help us fight Tempoross!
textByHash.8b81baa91ee15ad733fcc9a2e4714104a62b0807: It isn't, but worry not. The Spirit Anglers 'ave been formed t' tackle this beastie! We're recruiting all skilled sailors and fisherfolk t' help us.
textByHash.91ed6eb87ba402966ca12fe197201d121c914d25: Tempoross will surface soon, prepare yourselves!
textByHash.9af1353d6102f6b6a44e70042d7147860b1f4f56: Ye can find Gita just east of 'ere, next t' some fishin' equipment.
textByHash.9d7cbdf56ff187fc1409e0550cb9d1d2d28296f1: We'll set sail in the next 25 seconds.
textByHash.9e5d6434e409f349a326155af27c0d8c750f1c41: Since moving in, we've been recruiting fisherfolk from all over, and some of the readin' types 'ave been studyin' Tempoross durin' our trips to subdue it.
textByHash.a25422417172a5bf4a88b8e176950cfe52393b9d: The Chancellor called a meeting for all us local seafarin' folk and we agreed action must be taken!
textByHash.a3fd751580bea2fb1bd0efa80e29f39ad65182f2: Keep an eye on the waves!
textByHash.a513586df230beab8e7bbf7b406a99a8a8911803: Ain't nothin' goin' t' take the seas from me, even if it is a powerful spirit!
textByHash.a7e55484ca1ea7724b8059a248d46721e097cc4d: We usually find some debris washed up near the docks back at Unkah. Feel free t' have a look. Ya might find somethin' useful!
textByHash.a847118afa99230092328894e2d87bebd0e3f631: Tempoross has retreated to the depths!
textByHash.b44d2203498de1fc496839639763802cbae3291f: Once ye caught some, ye can cook 'em at the shrines on the island if ye want 'em to pack more of a punch. Then come back t' the ship an' load 'em in the ammunition crates next to the cannons.
textByHash.b723a5996b8d8a86fcfc8c38ac32798dc05c6b3f: Whatever they are, they make a fine base for the Spirit Anglers!
textByHash.bbef8bd2e5aefff1358a9e4454d2e35ea15710b0: It won't be long before Tempoross regains enough energy to be a problem and we'll have to wrangle it again. Hopefully we can count on you to 'elp!
textByHash.bda5e82627f33b42c0c33e81e739491f20326b62: Also, make sure t' grab a rope from the ship crates an' keep an eye out for big waves. We'll make sure t' shout about them. Then ye best quickly tether yerself t' an island totem pole or ship mast with that rope.
textByHash.ca07ccc8884c96b8841feeb5d785220ce0f45431: We find all sorts washed up by the storms. Aside from the usual junk, we often find old chests from merchant supply ships, as well as the odd artefact here and there.
textByHash.d26733344498973bf3d09bac25dc95c33e2536f3: I was sitting down by the shore enjoying one of Karim's kebabs at the time, when suddenly the crew washed up amongst a pile of debris. Looked like they'd just seen a ghost!
textByHash.d3aea1a81a5d4d99148a92d501d7853bb7745c88: Really? You will receive no reward if you do.
textByHash.d6b52c7ee2165b880e57bc7c4a2cf3c6880422d3: Plenty of room for more adventurers!
textByHash.deee8b34d5c0bc08065ed5eaf97e075553915c13: Tempoross has surfaced, keep those cannons firing!
textByHash.df7afeeac39aa0432af173952f399b61da71c305: Anyway, there's plenty o' research going on, so maybe you can find some notes lyin' around if ye want to know more.
textByHash.df9bf673aebe86ef72e2f9c4bbd2aced8d7dd5ed: Don't ask me what the ruins used to be. And it's not like Menaphos can 'ave a say!
textByHash.e44a764c980edc80ec882705af111004d6027059: When you're ready, just board the ship and we'll set sail soon!
textByHash.e65173841a971733a57144aa878ec44df08c5708: We'll set sail in the next 15 seconds.
textByHash.f098ca7a54641b2e003df8ec8a54b65944c97659: Ahoy there! What can I 'elp ye with?
textByHash.f7bcc9b9a133022821be82717a26854070b32f27: I'm just messin' with ye! Of course there are benefits!
textByHash.f843b3ea2b9fe85ec75ea980a301648d3a4cecbb: You 'aven't heard?! The freak storms? Sailors running into trouble? Ye really must be a landlubber!
textByHash.f8f645c0f3f192a63a2f11fc935b28533510e50b: Well, as I mentioned before, Taiman and his fishing crew from Al Kharid 'ad a tussle with Tempoross. They barely made it back.
textByHash.fc1e518853028e8d6f521fc6f745b79181b155b9: Are you sure? It's pretty rough out there and you look like you could do with more experience.
